keywords.job: I am the spokesperson of the Deraisim caste.
keywords.name: I am known as Faluae Ethrathil.
keywords.carlin: For a human city Carlin is not that bad. Its still a scar in the natural enviroment of course.
keywords.thais: Thais is fa away and that is a good thing.
keywords.venore: I don't appreciate that my people buy that much human wares but there is little I can do about it.
keywords.olrik: He is the assistant of the thaian ambassador.
keywords.elves: The elves are split in three castes: the Deraisim, the Kuridai, and the Cenath.
keywords.dwarfs: Funny little people sometimes. But their tunnels are harmful to the enviroment.
keywords.humans: I don't like their stone cities and their stench.
keywords.troll: I still can't stand the thought of the Kuridai keeping these disgusting creatures in our settlement.
keywords.army: I don't understand what you mean.
keywords.cenath: They think they are so wise but they lost the ability to adore the simple things.
keywords.kuridai: They are paranoid, what makes them so aggressive.
keywords.deraisim: We only stay here to keep our people together. We hunt for them, provide them with food, and scout the area.
keywords.abdaisim: Our lost brothers and sisters. Oh, we miss them so much.
keywords.teshial: I can only hope they will return one day.
keywords.ferumbras: I hope this fallen servant of evil will never find us.
keywords.crunor: I praise the Great Tree and Mother Earth, who gave birth to all life, and Nera, the celestial paladin.
keywords.nera: The lady of spring, helper of Crunor and Earth itself.
keywords.news: Sorry, the only news I have concern the growth of plants and the coming and going of animal herds.
keywords.magic: I learned a little about some minor spells.
keywords.druid: Druids are very close to Crunor.
keywords.spellbook: Sorry, I have none on me.
keywords.spell: I could teach you the spells of 'Light', 'Great Light', 'Food', and 'Find Person'.
keywords.find: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids and paladins.
keywords.person: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids and paladins.
keywords.light: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids and paladins.
keywords.food: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids and paladins.
keywords.great: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids and paladins.

texts: I am the spokesperson of the Deraisim caste.

entries.response: You need to advance to magic level %A to learn this spell.
You do not have enough gold to pay my services.
From now on you can cast this spell.
